title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TANZA HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANZA, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, INTO A NATIONAL TRADE SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE TANZA NATIONAL TRADE SCHOOL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APÂ­PROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5899 / 60 OG No. 7, 936 (February 17, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3832, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE TANZA HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANZA, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, INTO A NATIONAL TRADE SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE TANZA NATIONAL TRADE SCHOOL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APÂPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Tanza High School in the Municipality of Tanza, Province of Cavite, is hereby converted into a national trade school to be known as the Tanza National Trade School.

SEC. 2. The sum of one hundred fifty thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds of the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the conversion, operation and maintenance of said school during the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-four. ThereÂafter, such sum as may be needed for its operation and maintenance shall be included in the annual General ApÂpropriation Acts.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
